name: Engineering Lead
description: Engineering Lead - Technical implementation and team leadership
context: The Engineering Lead oversees technical implementation, code quality, and team performance. They evaluate based on technical feasibility, code maintainability, and development effort required.

evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through technical lens. Needs clear specs, reasonable scope, and quality focus.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on technical quality, clarity, effort estimation, and maintainability.
